testCases.testName: Create SHACLPropertyShape for text field, verify @context includes SHACL namespace
testCases.details: Successfully verified that SHACLPropertyShape for text field includes correct @context with SHACL (http://www.w3.org/ns/shacl#), Schema.org (http://schema.org/), and XSD (http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#) namespaces

testCases.testName: Create SHACLPropertyShape with required constraint, verify sh:minCount = 1
testCases.details: Successfully verified that required fields have sh:minCount set to 1, and optional fields do not have sh:minCount constraint

testCases.testName: Create SHACLPropertyShape for date field, verify sh:datatype = xsd:date
testCases.details: Successfully verified that date fields have correct sh:datatype = xsd:date. Also verified get_xsd_datatype() helper function returns correct datatypes for text (xsd:string), date (xsd:date), select (xsd:string), textarea (xsd:string), and number (xsd:integer)

testCases.testName: Validate JSON-LD context against JSON-LD specification
testCases.details: Successfully validated JSON-LD context structure follows specification. Verified SHACL_CONTEXT and SCHEMA_ORG_CONTEXT are valid dictionaries with required namespaces. Confirmed JSON-LD output is serializable and uses proper prefixed notation (@type, sh:, schema:, xsd:). Verified both PropertyShape and NodeShape JSON-LD structures are valid

testCases.testName: Verify TypeScript SHACLPropertyShape interface matches Python class
testCases.details: Successfully verified TypeScript interface matches Python class structure. Found 12 matching fields between Python and TypeScript implementations. Confirmed JSON-LD output from Python class is serializable and compatible with TypeScript consumption. Cross-language compatibility verified for: @context, @type, sh:path, sh:datatype, sh:name, sh:description, sh:minCount, sh:maxCount, sh:in, sh:pattern, sh:minLength, sh:maxLength

testCases.testName: Import SHACL schemas in field_generator service, verify no import errors
testCases.details: Successfully verified SHACL schemas can be imported without errors. Tested: (1) Individual module imports (schemas.shacl, schemas.jsonld_context), (2) Package-level imports (SHACLPropertyShape, SHACLNodeShape, SHACL_CONTEXT, build_field_context), (3) Helper functions (build_field_context, get_xsd_datatype), (4) Simulated field_generator service imports with PropertyShape creation. Verified __all__ exports are properly defined

implementationFiles.description: SHACL Schema Package initialization with exports for classes and helper functions
SHACLPropertyShape and SHACLNodeShape dataclasses with to_jsonld() and from_jsonld() methods
JSON-LD contexts (SHACL_CONTEXT, SCHEMA_ORG_CONTEXT), datatype mappings (XSD_DATATYPE_MAPPING), and helper functions (build_field_context, get_xsd_datatype, get_schema_org_property)
TypeScript interfaces for SHACLPropertyShape, SHACLNodeShape, JSONLDContext with helper functions (createPropertyShape, createNodeShape, getXsdDatatype, isRequired, getAllowedValues)
Extended FormField interface with optional shaclMetadata?: SHACLPropertyShape property

coverage.notes: All 6 test cases from requirements.md have been implemented and executed successfully

notes: All test cases passed successfully on first execution
SHACL schema implementation follows W3C SHACL specification (https://www.w3.org/TR/shacl/)
JSON-LD context structure follows JSON-LD 1.1 specification (https://json-ld.org/)
TypeScript interfaces provide full cross-language compatibility with Python dataclasses
Package structure supports easy import in future field_generator service implementation
Helper functions (build_field_context, get_xsd_datatype, get_schema_org_property) simplify SHACL metadata generation
Implementation includes comprehensive Schema.org property mappings for common form fields
Support for all form field types: text, date, select, textarea, number, email, phone, boolean
Both PropertyShape and NodeShape support bidirectional JSON-LD conversion (to_jsonld, from_jsonld)
